zh.Spernall, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯白納爾
zh.Coughton, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾庫頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Durvassal於1280年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Thomas Durvassal41歲，母親Margery Spermore38歲。她於1299年之前與William de la Spine在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾庫頓享年95歲。

zh-hans.Coughton, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾庫頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Durvassal于1280年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Thomas Durvassal41岁，母亲Margery Spermore38岁。她于1299年之前与William de la Spine在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾庫頓享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Durvassal was born in 1280, in Warwickshire, England, her father, Thomas Durvassal, was 41 and her mother, Margery Spermore, was 38. She married William de la Spine before 1299, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1375, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Durvassal est née en 1280, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Durvassal, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margery Spermore, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé William de la Spine avant 1299, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1375, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Durvassal 1280 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Durvassal 41 und ihre Mutter Margery Spermore 38. Sie hat vor 1299 in Warwickshire, England William de la Spine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1375 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Durvassal è nata il nel 1280 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Durvassal, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Margery Spermore, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato William de la Spine prima del 1299, nel Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1375, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Durvassalが1280年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Durvassalは41歳，母Margery Spermoreは38歳であった。1299年以前にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでWilliam de la Spineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Durvassal(이)가 1280년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Durvassal(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Spermore(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1299년 이전 영국 워윅실르에서 William de la Spine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Durvassal nasceu em 1280, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Durvassal, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margery Spermore, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com William de la Spine antes 1299, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1375, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Durvassal родилась в 1280 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Durvassal было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Spermore, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de la Spine перед 1299 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1375 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Durvassal nació en 1280, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Durvassal, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margery Spermore, tenía 38 años. Se casó con William de la Spine antes de 1299, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1375, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 95 años.
